mapper.select: select id, name, latitude, longitude, status, create_time from parking_point where status = 1 order by id desc

select count(*) from parking_point
and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into parking_point (name, latitude, longitude, status, create_time) values (#{name}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update parking_point
name = #{name},
latitude = #{latitude},
longitude = #{longitude},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
